name: mouseless
description: macOS desktop control over MCP — screenshots, mouse, keyboard, app management.
long_description: Mouseless exposes 21 tools for controlling macOS: screenshot the primary display, zoom a region, click/double-click/right-click/drag, scroll, move the cursor, type text, send key combos, read and write the clipboard, launch apps, and dispatch sequences in a single batch call.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture the primary display (returns MCP ImageContent)

tools.name: zoom
tools.description: High-res capture of a screen region

tools.name: left_click_drag
tools.description: Click-drag from start to end with animated move

tools.name: key
tools.description: Key combo in xdotool syntax (e.g. cmd+shift+a)

tools.name: hold_key
tools.description: Hold a key for N seconds

tools.name: write_clipboard
tools.description: Write clipboard via pbcopy (with read-back verify)

tools.name: open_application
tools.description: Launch or focus an app by name or bundle ID

tools.name: computer_batch
tools.description: Execute a sequence of actions in one call
